open_training_body: Object detection will be stopped and the GPU handed over to the training tools while this page is open. Detection resumes automatically when you leave the training page.
failed_enter_training: Could not enter training mode: {{ err }}
no_datasets_yet: No datasets yet — create a new one or upload an existing YOLO-formatted dataset to get started.
dataset_must_be_zip: The dataset must be a .zip archive
upload_dataset_notice: Uploaded datasets must be in YOLO format (images/ + labels/ + data.yaml, packed as a .zip). The inference service only runs YOLO26 models.
delete_dataset_body: '{{ name }}' and its {{ count }} images will be permanently deleted.
delete_dataset_body_one: '{{ name }}' and its 1 image will be permanently deleted.
dataset_card_meta: {{ images }} images ({{ labeled }} labeled), {{ classes }} classes
images_counter: {{ count }} images ({{ labeled }} labeled) — minimum {{ min }}
train_tooltip_ready: Train a model with this dataset
train_tooltip_requirements: Needs at least {{ min }} images, one class and one labeled image
wait_training_finish: Wait for training to finish (or cancel it) first
new_class_prompt: New class name (optional color, e.g. cap #ff0000):
create_class_hint: Create at least one class to start labeling. Optional color: class_name #hex, e.g. class_name #ff0000.
remove_class_confirm: Remove class '{{ name }}'? Its boxes are deleted and the remaining classes are renumbered.
failed_create_class: Failed to create class '{{ name }}': {{ err }}
create_class_before_accepting: Create a class before accepting labels
create_class_before_drawing: Create a class before drawing labels
no_images_yet: No images yet — use the capture button to start building the dataset.
replicate_help: Copies this image and its labels to grow the dataset (1-50).
select_image_hint: Select an image in the dataset panel to start labeling
describe_object_placeholder: Describe the object (e.g. 'bottle') or click on it
accept_suggestions_title: Tags the suggestions with the prompt's class (created if new)
sam_prompt_needed: Type a prompt or click on objects first
sam_no_objects: SAM found no objects for this prompt
model_name_help: Letters, digits, '_' and '-' only. The trained model is saved as this name.
patience_help: Stop early after this many epochs without improvement (0 = run all epochs).
keep_tab_open: Training on the device GPU — please keep this tab open.
finish_now_question: Finish now and keep the best model so far?
